args.code:
import pandas as pd
import json

businesses = locals()['var_function-call-5186548942623660720']
reviews = locals()['var_function-call-17890868539983417793']

# Convert to dataframes
df_bus = pd.DataFrame(businesses)
df_rev = pd.DataFrame(reviews)

# Calculate average rating
df_avg = df_rev.groupby('gmap_id')['rating'].mean().reset_index()
df_avg.columns = ['gmap_id', 'avg_rating']

# Merge with business names
df_final = pd.merge(df_bus, df_avg, on='gmap_id')

# Sort
df_final = df_final.sort_values(by='avg_rating', ascending=False)

# Get top 5
top_5 = df_final.head(5)[['name', 'avg_rating']].to_dict(orient='records')

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(top_5))

args.code:
import pandas as pd
import json

businesses = locals()['var_function-call-5186548942623660720']
reviews = locals()['var_function-call-17890868539983417793']

# Convert to dataframes
df_bus = pd.DataFrame(businesses)
df_rev = pd.DataFrame(reviews)

# Convert rating to numeric
df_rev['rating'] = pd.to_numeric(df_rev['rating'])

# Calculate average rating
df_avg = df_rev.groupby('gmap_id')['rating'].mean().reset_index()
df_avg.columns = ['gmap_id', 'avg_rating']

# Merge with business names
df_final = pd.merge(df_bus, df_avg, on='gmap_id')

# Sort
df_final = df_final.sort_values(by='avg_rating', ascending=False)

# Get top 5
top_5 = df_final.head(5)[['name', 'avg_rating']].to_dict(orient='records')

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(top_5))
